summary: Made surgical seam edits to distinguish the chapter opening from the adjacent chapter's damage-observation scaffold and to strengthen the handoff into the next chapter's escalating castle damage.
edits: Reframed the opening around Gavin's delayed recognition after passing Barnabas's portrait, then retained the Great Hall ceiling as the confirmation point.
Kept the original discovery, timeline, and tone while shifting the entry point away from another location-state opening.
Adjusted the closing damage summary to foreground broken glass and scorch marks, improving continuity into chapter 16.
